name: @caia/ea-plan-reviewer
description: EA Plan Reviewer — the primary EA review sub-agent under @caia/ea-architect (the Coordinator). Reads a submitted plan against the EA Repository (12 principles + 61+ ADRs + lessons + risks + operator feedback) and issues a structured PlanReviewVerdict (approved | approved-with-modifications | rejected | needs-clarification). When clarification is needed, drives a multi-turn dialogue against a per-submission @caia/plan-defender (the producing agent's faithful proxy) via the spawner's askQuestion API. Each round refines the verdict; hard 5-round cap per spec §3.6 forces a terminal verdict or operator escalation. Inherits @caia/ea-architect's critic prompt, repository loader, and hallucination guard — the same single-pass review is reused as the round-1 case of the iteration loop.
